", "highlights": "

Keep your desk neat and clutter-free with this Multi-Layer Desktop Storage Organizer. Designed with adjustable clear dividers, it allows you to customize each compartment for different stationery and small accessories. Choose between the Flat Divider version for general storage or the Angled Divider version for easy access to pens, markers, and pencils.

Perfect for home, office, study desk, classroom, or craft room.

Features

  • ✅ Adjustable divider slots for customizable storage\n
  • ✅ Available in Flat Divider or Angled Divider design\n
  • ✅ Ideal for pens, pencils, highlighters, markers, rulers, scissors, correction tape, clips, and other stationery\n
  • ✅ Bottom drawer for storing small accessories\n
  • ✅ Space-saving vertical design\n
  • ✅ Made from durable plastic\n
  • ✅ Modern minimalist style suitable for any workspace\n

Specifications

  • Material: Plastic\n
  • Color: White\n
  • Dimensions: 11.8 × 7.7 × 25.2 cm\n

Variants

1. Flat Divider

  • Suitable for storing various office supplies and small items\n
  • Adjustable shelves create compartments of different heights\n

2. Angled Divider

  • Slanted compartments keep pens and markers visible and easy to grab\n
  • Great for frequently used stationery\n

Package Includes

  • 1 × Desktop Storage Organizer (Selected Variant)\n

Perfect for storing:

  • Pens & pencils\n
  • Highlighters & markers\n
  • Sticky notes\n
  • Erasers\n
  • Correction tape\n
  • Paper clips\n
  • Rulers\n
  • Craft supplies\n
  • Small office accessories\n

A practical and stylish storage solution to keep your workspace clean, organized, and efficient.
